scoringPlays.text: Jalen Buckley 65 Yd Run (Palmer Domschke Kick)
Kershawn Fisher 47 Yd Fumble Return (Palmer Domschke Kick)
Mareyohn Hrabowski 4 Yd pass from Broc Lowry (Palmer Domschke Kick)
Blake Bosma 3 Yd pass from Broc Lowry (Palmer Domschke PAT failed)
Devin Miles 2 Yd Run (Palmer Domschke Kick)
Joey Pope 75 Yd Interception Return (Palmer Domschke Kick)
Javon Rogers 82 Yd pass from Amari Odom (Britton Williams PAT failed)

videos.headline: WMU's Jalen Buckley runs for a 65-yard TD on 1st play from scrimmage
videos.description: Jalen Buckley scores a 65-yard touchdown to give Western Michigan a 7-0 lead on the game's first play from scrimmage.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (WMU's Jalen Buckley runs for a 65-yard TD on 1st play from scrimmage) 2025/12/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Broc Lowry connects with Mareyohn Hrabowski for another WMU TD
videos.description: Broc Lowry rolls out and hits Mareyohn Hrabowski for a touchdown to give Western Michigan a 21-0 lead over Kennesaw State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Broc Lowry connects with Mareyohn Hrabowski for another WMU TD) 2025/12/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Western Michigan gets its 2nd TD in 76 seconds on a scoop and score
videos.description: Kennesaw State's Amari Odom gets sacked by Rodney McGraw, then Kershawn Fisher scoops the ball up and returns it for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Western Michigan gets its 2nd TD in 76 seconds on a scoop and score) 2025/12/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Western Michigan scores its 4th TD of the 1st quarter
videos.description: Broc Lowry passes it to a wide-open Blake Bosma to extend Western Michigan's lead over Kennesaw State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Western Michigan scores its 4th TD of the 1st quarter) 2025/12/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devin Miles powers in for 2-yard TD
videos.description: Devin Miles finds the end zone for Western Michigan to extend their lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Devin Miles powers in for 2-yard TD) 2025/12/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Western Michigan's Tate Hallock picks off Amari Odom in 2nd quarter
videos.description: Tate Hallock intercepts Amari Odom to give the ball back to Western Michigan in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Western Michigan's Tate Hallock picks off Amari Odom in 2nd quarter) 2025/12/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Javon Rogers hauls in 82-yard pass to get Kennesaw State on the board
videos.description: Kennesaw State gets its first score of the game with an 82-yard touchdown pass from Amari Odom to Javon Rogers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Javon Rogers hauls in 82-yard pass to get Kennesaw State on the board) 2025/12/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Broc Lowry picked off in the red zone
videos.description: Caleb Offord picks off Broc Lowry to give the ball back to Kennesaw State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Broc Lowry picked off in the red zone) 2025/12/19 ESHEET
